title: User Signal Map Entry
description: One user-meaningful signal tracked across pipeline transformations. The feature-keeper (M2.10.1) auto-detects candidates from the user's .asc / .cir, asks for confirmation, and persists the resolved map back into user_context.json so downstream stages (composer .meas, report, ranking) speak the user's vocabulary.

name.description: User-facing name. Used as the prefix for .meas directives (e.g. 'Vout' -> Vout_peak, Vout_rms). Must be a valid SPICE identifier.

kind.description: Signal kind. 'temperature' is reserved for future thermal extensions; the MVP only emits .meas for voltage/current/power.

expr.description: SPICE probe expression. Voltage: 'V(net)' or 'V(p,n)'. Current: 'I(refdes)' (e.g. 'I(L1)'). Power: 'V(net)*I(refdes)' or vendor-specific.

unit.description: Display unit. Defaults: V for voltage, A for current, W for power, degC for temperature.

target_band.description: Optional expected operating band. The report flags out-of-band observed values.

source.description: Where this entry came from: 'auto' = deterministic deduction, 'user' = declared in user_context, 'llm' = refined by signal_map_agent.

confidence.description: Confidence of the auto-detect / LLM refinement. 1.0 when source='user' (the user declared it explicitly).

rationale.description: Why this name/expr was chosen. Surfaces in the report's Tracked signals section.

from_label.description: Original schematic label (from .asc FLAG/IOPIN) when the deduction came from there. Empty when the deduction came purely from .cir net names.
